releases.title: Webhooks mTLS Certificate Change
releases.description: Webhooks mTLS certificates switching to Meta CA. Trust store updates required.

releases.title: Account Health Score in Ads Manager
releases.description: Visible Account Health Score (0-100) now displayed.

releases.title: Graph API v25 — Page Viewer Metric
releases.description: New Page Viewer Metric replacing legacy reach. Deprecation by June 2026.

releases.title: Threads Ads — Global Rollout
releases.description: Threads in ad ecosystem with global delivery. Image/video with full Ads Manager integration.

releases.title: Advantage+ as Default for New Campaigns
releases.description: Advantage+ automation tools are now the default for all new campaigns.

releases.title: Advantage+ Leads Campaigns — Global Launch
releases.description: Advantage+ Leads Campaigns now available globally.

releases.title: Instagram/Facebook Page Visits Goal
releases.description: New performance goal: 'Maximise Number of Profile/Page Visits'.

releases.title: Ad Sequencing for Awareness & Engagement
releases.description: Ad Sequencing now available for Awareness and Engagement objectives.

releases.title: New Ad Format Selection System
releases.description: Single ad can now use multiple formats and creatives.

releases.title: CTA Button Behavior Change
releases.description: CTA in Ads Manager no longer modifies original organic posts.

releases.title: 'Describe Your Audience' Natural Language Targeting
releases.description: AI-powered text box in Advantage+ Targeting — write plain-text audience descriptions.

releases.title: Custom Audience Engagement Filters
releases.description: New retargeting filters: engagement frequency and time frame.

releases.title: New 'Conversion Count' Breakdown
releases.description: New breakdown dimension added to Ads Manager reporting.

releases.title: Attribution Metric Alignment Update
releases.description: Click-through attribution now counts only link clicks. Non-link interactions categorized as engage-through.

releases.title: Video Engaged-View Threshold Changed
releases.description: Engaged-view threshold dropped from 10 to 5 seconds for video ads.

upcoming_changes.title: Location Fees (Digital Service Tax)
upcoming_changes.description: Extra charges in AT(5%), FR(3%), IT(3%), ES(3%), TR(5%), UK(2%). Based on where ads shown.

upcoming_changes.title: Legacy Page Reach Metric Deprecation
upcoming_changes.description: Legacy reach metric fully removed. Migrate to Page Viewer Metric.

upcoming_changes.title: ASC/AAC Campaign API Deprecation
upcoming_changes.description: Marketing API phases out legacy Advantage Shopping and App Campaign APIs.
